# nebius_iam_token Ephemeral Resource

> Ephemeral resources require Terraform 1.10.0 or later. For background, see the Terraform documentation for ephemeral resources: https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral

IAM token resource.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `expires_at` (String) The expiration time of the token.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) The IAM access token.
